name: uranohubspot
description: Plugin MCP de HubSpot para Urano — gestión completa de CRM, contactos, empresas, negocios y propietarios.

scripts.pack: npm run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path'),src='SKILL.md';fs.existsSync(src)&&fs.copyFileSync(src,'dist/'+src)" && echo 'Copia SKILL.md a dist/ completada. Comprime el contenido de dist/ en hubspot-aiplugin.zip'
scripts.urano-launch: powershell -Command "Copy-Item SKILL.md, README.md, package.json -Destination dist -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Compress-Archive -Path dist\* -DestinationPath ($env:npm_package_name + '.zip') -Force"
